_comment: deal-resourcing converts a signed deal into a production resource plan with task list and invoice schedule.
description: Production resource plan for a signed deal: task list, critical path, and invoice schedule.

steps.input_from: deal_id + production hours from step1 + deal_rate

note: Only operates on deals in the signed, in-production, or delivered stage. Invoice state is read-only; this spoke does not issue invoices.
